rules.title: State-changing tool with no record-keeping declared
rules.guidance: Log invocations of tools that change state, enough to reconstruct what the agent did.

rules.title: External-access tool with no record-keeping declared
rules.guidance: Log calls a tool makes to external systems, including the target and the outcome.

rules.title: Data-writing tool with no record-keeping declared
rules.guidance: Log write operations a tool performs so changes to data are traceable.

rules.title: Data-writing tool with no human approval and no oversight
rules.guidance: Add an approval step before a tool can write, or declare a human oversight process.

rules.title: State-changing tool with no human approval and no oversight
rules.guidance: Gate state-changing tool calls behind a human approval step, or declare an oversight process.

rules.title: External-access tool with no human approval and no oversight
rules.guidance: Require human review for tools that reach external systems, or declare an oversight process.

rules.title: Tool handling personal data with no transparency notice
rules.guidance: Inform affected people that an automated agent processes their personal data through this tool.

rules.title: Tool handling credentials with no transparency notice
rules.guidance: Document and disclose that this tool handles credentials, and who can see the resulting actions.

rules.title: External data flow with no transparency notice
rules.guidance: Disclose that the agent sends data to external systems through this tool.
